title: Procedural Planet Surface
description: A terrestrial planet surface with undeformed sphere-direction ownership, a deterministic CPU terrain stack evaluated by the same value-noise field in GLSL, tangential planet-space climate warping, coupled ocean/biome/roughness causes, derivative bump, and specular anti-aliasing.
techniques: shared deterministic CPU and GLSL terrain field
coupled climate biome and material masks
derivative procedural bump and roughness filtering
